name: page_size
label: Page size
hint: Number of results shown on each page.

name: candidate_limit
label: Candidate limit
hint: Maximum number of readable KB records to score in memory.

name: include_body_search
label: Include body search
hint: Include article body text as a low-weight fallback search tier.

name: article_page_id
label: Article page ID
hint: Portal page ID used to open a KB article from the results list.

name: catalog_item_page_id
label: Catalog item page ID
hint: Portal page ID used to open a catalog item or record producer from the results list.

name: news_page_id
label: News page ID
hint: Portal page ID used to open a news article from the results list.

name: news_content_type_id
label: News content type sys_id
hint: Content type sys_id used to limit news search results in sn_cd_content_base.

name: portal_sys_id
label: Portal sys_id override
hint: Optional override. Leave empty to use the current portal context automatically.

name: synonym_dictionary_id
label: Synonym dictionary sys_id
hint: Optional ts_synonym_set dictionary sys_id. Leave empty to use all active synonym sets.

name: featured_knowledge_base_id
label: Featured knowledge base sys_id
hint: Knowledge base sys_id used for the dedicated knowledge base filter. Change this in the target instance.

name: featured_knowledge_base_label
label: Featured knowledge base label
hint: User-facing label for the dedicated knowledge base filter.
